distribution_policy.notes: Apache-2.0 package distribution is approved for built wheel/sdist artifacts. Repository-public technical blockers are cleared, but repository publication is not authorized until these authoritative approval fields contain the reviewed state and validated HTTPS evidence references.

public_core_candidates.notes: Generic MCP framing, tool schemas, and server facade can be part of a reviewed public core.
Generic schema and normalization logic are candidates after private target formats and examples are separated.
Synthetic fixtures are the preferred public demonstration surface.
Only style packs with visibility public_core are candidates for public release.

private_or_internal_components.notes: Project-derived target formats and profiles remain runtime-compatible, but internal style packs are no longer exposed through the public style-pack registry.
Workflow documents have been marker-sanitized and remain excluded from built package artifacts.
Real project identifiers have been replaced with synthetic fixtures or public-safe aliases outside the release-check fixtures.

release_exit_criteria: LICENSE and NOTICE match Apache-2.0 package distribution.
Owner/advisor/university/IP approval is recorded outside the repository or in a reviewed release ticket when applicable.
scripts/check_public_release.py passes for the release candidate.
Internal/private style packs are removed from the public distribution or split into a private package.
Private workflow documents and real research markers are absent from the public candidate.
uv build and twine check pass for the final package artifacts.
A clean environment can install the wheel and run figops-mcp --smoke.

license_clearance.why: Permissive for academic and industry reuse while preserving attribution and including an explicit patent grant.
required_approvals: Confirm university/advisor/lab ownership of code and release authority when applicable.
Confirm no unpublished research data, private style packs, or internal workflow docs are included in built wheel/sdist artifacts.
Confirm third-party dependency licenses are compatible with Apache-2.0 package distribution.
Confirm the PyPI project owner/account and maintainer names are final.
do_not_do_before_approval: Do not make the full private repository public while repo-level private markers remain.
Do not bypass scripts/guarded_pypi_upload.py for TestPyPI or PyPI uploads.
